archetype_reasoning: With 723 resolved trades across 184 distinct geopolitical markets, this trader demonstrates broad coverage and genuine directional conviction (directionality 0.954). Entries are predominantly at contested prices (0.10-0.80 range), not near-certainty harvesting. Strong positive PnL ($13,170) across diverse domains including Trump_US, China_Asia, Iran_ME, and Europe confirms real forecasting edge rather than liquidity provision or yield-harvesting.
domain_blindspots: LatAm: 33% accuracy on 3 trades, weak sample and poor calibration — recent Kast/Peru positions suggest overconfidence in LatAm political calls
domain_summary: This trader has a clear and sustained edge in Trump_US (72.1% accuracy, 534 trades), with strong supplementary performance in Iran_ME (78.6%), Russia_UKR (76.2%), and Europe (72.7%). LatAm is an explicit blind spot with only 3 trades at 33% accuracy, though recent open positions suggest expanding into that domain incautiously.
signal_weight_reasoning: ELO of 3707 active is far above the LEGENDARY threshold of 2175, with 723 resolved trades providing a statistically robust sample. Accuracy rates above 70% in four distinct domains, contested-price entries, and positive PnL across a large trade universe justify FULL weight. LatAm should be individually discounted given the track record.

summary: This is a LEGENDARY-tier trader with one of the highest active ELO scores in the system, backed by 723 resolved trades and sustained accuracy above 70% in Trump_US, Iran_ME, Russia_UKR, and Europe. The trader demonstrates genuine forecasting behaviour: contested-price entries, broad market diversity, and strong directional conviction. The primary concern is a pattern of sunk-cost accumulation in losing positions (California redistricting, Dutch coalition) and a troubling expansion into LatAm with oversized positions despite a 33% historical accuracy in that domain. Signals from Trump_US, Iran_ME, and Russia_UKR should be treated as high-conviction; LatAm signals should be discounted until the track record improves.
